drd_expression: CASE WHEN TXN.SRC_STM_ID = 5 AND APA.AC_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ORIG_AR_AC_SUBDIM.AC_NUM ELSE ORIG_SRC_STM_AR_DIM.ORIG_SRC_STM_AR_ID END
drd_rule:
ccal_repl_owner.txn t
join ccal_repl_owner.apa apa on apa.exec_id = t.txn_id
 
WHEN txn.src_stm_id = 5 (RJBNK1) and apa.ac_id is not null (NOTE: APA on ESP activity is always APACSH defined on [ETL Notes] tab)
THEN
left join ccsi_owner.ar_ac_subdim aas ON 
aas.ar_id = t.ar_id 
AND aas.dep_ac_setup_id = apa.ac_id
and aas.eff_dt <= t.td
and aas.end_dt > t.td
use aas.AC_NUM
ELSE
ccal_repl_owner.txn t
left join ccsi_owner.ar_dim ard ON ard.AR_ID = t.AR_ID
and ard.eff_dt <= t.td
and ard.end_dt > t.td
use ard.ORIG_SRC_STM_AR_ID
notes: Compiled DRD RJBNK1/APACSH branch to AR_AC_SUBDIM else AR_DIM.

drd_rule:
Use APACSH logic from 'ETL Notes' tab.

For a Transaction, If 2 APACSH records exists
     If (one record is 'APACSH04' & other is 'APACSH11') 
          then skip 'APACSH04' record and load 'APACSH11' but use the values to
          populate sales charge attributes from 'APACSH04' for 5 attributes (Sales Charge Rate Multiplier Number, Sales Charge Rate, Sales Charge Rate Type Code, Sales Charge Rate Type Id, Sales Charge Rate Type Name)
     else exception entire transaction

ccal_repl_owner.txn t
join ccal_repl_owner.apa ap ON ap.exec_id = t.txn_id
left join ccal_repl_owner.cl_val cv ON AP.APA_TP_ID = cv.CL_VAL_ID AND
CASE    WHEN AP.SALE_CHRG_RATE_TP_ID = 2507 
            THEN AP.SALE_CHRG_RATE
notes: Compiled APACSH ETL Notes source alias from DRD.

generated_expression: CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE TXN_RLTNP.TXN_RLTNP_TP_ID = 69 AND TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID AND (TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID = TXN.TXN_ID OR TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID = TXN.TXN_ID)) THEN 'Y' END
drd_expression: CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE TXN_RLTNP.TXN_RLTNP_TP_ID = 69 AND TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID AND (TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID = TXN.TXN_ID OR TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID = TXN.TXN_ID)) THEN 'Y' END
drd_rule:
If there is a record in CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP table with TXN.TXN_ID = TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID
and TXN_RLTNP_TP_ID = 69 (Cancel)
and TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID
then set to 'Y' for both TRGT_TXN_ID and SRC_TXN_ID.

The check should be performed each time when a new record is written into CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP with TXN_RLTNP_TP_ID = 69 and update the flag for both TRGT_TXN_ID and SRC_TXN_ID, if TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID.

Note: TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID is needed because it is possible that cancellation trade points to itself when the original trade that is being cancelled is not found. In this case Cancelled Flag should not be set to 'Y'

For TXN.SRC_STM_ID = 60 (ACTDETTD), use TRADE_NUMBER.
Parse to extract SDIRA Transaction Type.

notes: DRD says last two digits + century.

drd_rule:
Fetch FA_NUMBER_V.FA_NUMBER_TYPE_CODE As OWN_FA_NUM_TP_CD

LEFT Join with CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN TXN With CCSI_OWNER.AR_GRP_SUBDIM AR_GRP_SUBDIM ON TXN.AR_ID = AR_GRP_SUBDIM.AR_ID
And TXN.TD >= AR_GRP_SUBDIM.EFF_DT
And TXN.TD < AR_GRP_SUBDIM.END_DT
Left Join SSDS_DAL_OWNER.FA_NUMBER_V FA_NUMBER_V ON AR_GRP_SUBDIM.FA_NUM = FA_NUMBER_V.FA_NUMBER
And TXN.TD >= FA_NUMBER_V.EFFECTIVE_DATE
And TXN.TD < FA_NUMBER_V.END_DATE
notes: Used DRD source attribute; join must be implemented from AD rule.

drd_rule:
Fetch CODE_SET_VALUE_V.CODE_VALUE_DESCRIPTION As OWN_FA_NUM_TP
 
LEFT Join with CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN TXN With CCSI_OWNER.AR_GRP_SUBDIM AR_GRP_SUBDIM ON TXN.AR_ID = AR_GRP_SUBDIM.AR_ID
And TXN.TD >= AR_GRP_SUBDIM.EFF_DT
And TXN.TD < AR_GRP_SUBDIM.END_DT
Left Join SSDS_DAL_OWNER.FA_NUMBER_V FA_NUMBER_V ON AR_GRP_SUBDIM.FA_NUM = FA_NUMBER_V.FA_NUMBER
And TXN.TD >= FA_NUMBER_V.EFFECTIVE_DATE
And TXN.TD < FA_NUMBER_V.END_DATE
Left Join SSDS_DAL_OWNER.CODE_SET_VALUE_V CODE_SET_VALUE_V ON CODE_SET_VALUE_V.CODE_VALUE_ID = FA_NUMBER_V.FA_NUMBER_TYPE_CODE_ID
And TXN.TD >= CODE_SET_VALUE_V.EFFECTIVE_DATE
And TXN.TD < CODE_SET_VALUE_V.END_DATE
notes: Used DRD source attribute; join must be implemented from AD rule.
